title: Prepare raw materials and compost feedstock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare raw materials and compost feedstock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Organise for processing

pcs.text: Determine processing requirements from job specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine processing requirements from job specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine processing requirements from job specifications.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select required materials, equipment and machinery, and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select required materials, equipment and machinery, and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select required materials, equipment and machinery, and check for safe operation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Organise for processing

elements.title: Prepare raw materials and compost the feedstock mixture

pcs.text: Identify and collect raw materials and additives, and check for physical contamination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and collect raw materials and additives, and check for physical contamination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and collect raw materials and additives, and check for physical contamination.

pcs.text: Confirm composting technology and methods to be used according to raw material types and workplace product requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm composting technology and methods to be used according to raw material types and workplace product requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm composting technology and methods to be used according to raw material types and workplace product requirements.

pcs.text: Pre-process raw materials into suitable forms for composting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Pre-process raw materials into suitable forms for composting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Pre-process raw materials into suitable forms for composting.

pcs.text: Mix pre-processed raw materials into suitable feedstock mixtures for composting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mix pre-processed raw materials into suitable feedstock mixtures for composting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mix pre-processed raw materials into suitable feedstock mixtures for composting.

pcs.text: Handle feedstock mixtures for composting according to technology, appropriate method and industry best practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle feedstock mixtures for composting according to technology, appropriate method and industry best practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle feedstock mixtures for composting according to technology, appropriate method and industry best practice.

pcs.text: Assign batch numbers or codes, and create batch documentation to enable tracking of batch
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assign batch numbers or codes, and create batch documentation to enable tracking of batch?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assign batch numbers or codes, and create batch documentation to enable tracking of batch.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare raw materials and compost the feedstock mixture

elements.title: Monitor composting process

pcs.text: Monitor composting batch by observing and using field testing equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor composting batch by observing and using field testing equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor composting batch by observing and using field testing equipment.

pcs.text: Maintain processing and operations records for process control and to track batch through the compost production cycle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain processing and operations records for process control and to track batch through the compost production cycle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain processing and operations records for process control and to track batch through the compost production cycle.

pcs.text: Identify and report faults or variations to supervisor, and take remedial action to maintain effective and consistent compost production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report faults or variations to supervisor, and take remedial action to maintain effective and consistent compost production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report faults or variations to supervisor, and take remedial action to maintain effective and consistent compost production.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Monitor composting process

elements.title: Conduct quality control inspection

pcs.text: Inspect and assess finished compost for compliance according to workplace product requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect and assess finished compost for compliance according to workplace product requirements.

pcs.text: Report faults or variations in compost product

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report faults or variations in compost product.

pcs.text: Adjust and reprocess non-compliant product

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust and reprocess non-compliant product.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm compliance of compost batch according to workplace product requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete batch documentation for compliant compost product.

pcs.text: Inform sales and operational staff members that product is suitable for sale or preparation of value-added products

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform sales and operational staff members that product is suitable for sale or preparation of value-added products.

elements.title: Clean up area

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and secure load-shift machinery and other processing equipment according to workplace procedures.
